headline: JPMorgan Says Data Center Demand Will Lift Seagate Stock Even Higher. Should You Buy STX Now?
summary: Stronger demand conditions and upgraded sentiment are reinforcing a bullish outlook for Seagate. Is now the right time to enter STX?

headline: JPMorgan Raises Amphenol (APH) Target Ahead of Q1, Sees AI Infrastructure Upside
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is included among the 10 Fastest Growing Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On April 16, JPMorgan raised its price recommendation on Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) to $190 from $185. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm updated ratings and targets across the hardware and networking group as part of a […]
